name: DDLC: Water Park Tomfoolery! | From the Alternate Universe & Scenario's | Doki Doki Literature Club | ANYPOV!
description:
At a Water Park... With the Doki's... In quite possibly the cutest Bikinis and swimwear ever. It's peak fluff is what I'm saying.

Music Mania is no more... :(

I did a beach day scenario once in the past... But, a Water Park has a lot more silly Fluff potential... So... I cooked this up. Onto the notes!

  • Fluff Prioritized! — No Angst, no Horror and no Smut! Though, judging by the swimwear... I know some of you will do something outrageous... I DIDN'T INTEND for that behavior. But, go at it. Ig.

  • DDLC! — At a Water Park! With the Doki's! This is more silly, Fluff and just dumb wholesomeness! Every now and then it's fun to just release a wholesome Bot with just a comforting and or silly core focus. FORGET plot points! And a serious tone! :) Have fun.

  • ANYPOV! — The Doki's all like you individually, regardless of gender! If you CHOOSE to go down any routes with them romantically.

That's about it! 💙

I hope you enjoy! Leave a review if you do! And you know by now, tell me what you did! What happened? :) And one more thing... I love you. Have a great day. 💙

My Discord: HERE!

The meme drout continues... :(
creator: GhostOfOmi
